SELECT ?newClub ?clubLabel WHERE {
  wd:Q142794 p:P54 ?memBarca .
  ?memBarca ps:P54 wd:Q7156 .
  ?memBarca pq:P582 ?endBarca .

}
ORDER BY ASC(?startNew)
LIMIT 1
